tasks.subject: Result Task 1: Result<T, TError> core + carriers + Result scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The typed Result struct (state, factories, all four implicit conversions, state inspection, TryGet*, Match, ValueOrThrow) plus the static Result class shell and Success<T>/Failure<TError> carrier structs. No operators yet.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/Result.cs
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTAndTError.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOfTAndTErrorTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ResultOfTAndTErrorTests" && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/Result.cs", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTAndTError.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOfTAndTErrorTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ResultOfTAndTErrorTests\" && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 2: Result<TError> void-success variant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The void-success Result struct, mirroring the typed variant but without the value side. Includes factories, conversions, IsSuccess/IsFailure/IsDefault, TryGetError, Match, ThrowIfFailure.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTError.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOfTErrorTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ResultOfTErrorTests" && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTError.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOfTErrorTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ResultOfTErrorTests\" && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 3: Composition operators — Map, MapError, Bind (sync)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Map, MapError, and Bind to Result<T, TError>, and MapError and Bind to Result<TError>. Includes cross-type Bind overloads (typed↔void). Sync only.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTAndTError.cs
- Modify: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTError.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOperatorsTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ResultOperatorsTests" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTAndTError.cs", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/ResultOfTError.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultOperatorsTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ResultOperatorsTests\" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 4: Result.Try and Result.TryAsync exception interop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bidirectional exception interop — catch-and-map at boundaries. Four overloads (sync typed, sync void, async typed, async void). Catches every Exception except OperationCanceledException (rethrown unchanged).

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/Result.Try.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultTryTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ResultTryTests" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/Result.Try.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/ResultTryTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~ResultTryTests\" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 5: TaskResultExtensions — async surface over Task<Result<...>>
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extension methods on Task<Result<T, TError>> and Task<Result<TError>> so chains compose naturally across await boundaries. Each extension awaits with ConfigureAwait(false) and delegates to the sync operator.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/TaskResultExtensions.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/TaskResultExtensionsTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~TaskResultExtensionsTests" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Results/TaskResultExtensions.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/TaskResultExtensionsTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~TaskResultExtensionsTests\" && dotnet test && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 6: FanOut composition tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Behavioral tests for the two documented composition patterns with FanOut. Pattern 1: wrap FanOut with Result.TryAsync. Pattern 2: per-op Results collapsed with Bind, including the documented limitation that FanOut does not fail-fast on Result-failures.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/FanOutCompositionTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FanOutCompositionTests" && dotnet test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Results/FanOutCompositionTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~FanOutCompositionTests\" && dotnet test", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 7: Example program — boundary + FanOut pattern 1
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Runnable example showing the end-to-end 'explicit failure flow at boundaries' story: a boundary method calling two async deps via FanOut, wrapped with Result.TryAsync, mapping thrown exceptions into a sealed-record ApiError DU, and a handler switching exhaustively.

**Files:**
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs

**Verify:** dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples && dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples && dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Result Task 8: README, CHANGELOG, and ROADMAP updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the Result feature in README ('What's in the box'), add a CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased], and mark the Result sub-project complete in ROADMAP.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md
- Modify: docs/ROADMAP.md

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test && dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "docs/ROADMAP.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test && dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-result.md"}
```
